raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "cup",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The cup (5x5x8 cm) is within reach of the right arm, and its left/right/front sides are accessible, allowing a safe lateral grasp without colliding with box_2 behind it.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is securely grasped by the right end-effector and lifted clear of the tabletop, removing the obstruction in front of box_2."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "table (front-right open area, away from box_1 and box_2)",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "The robot is holding the cup and there is a clear, stable region on the tabletop to place it such that it will not interfere with manipulating box_1 or box_2.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is placed on the table in a clear front-right area and released; the space around the boxes is less cluttered."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The right side of box_2 is accessible and there is sufficient free space to the right to slide box_2 away from box_1 without contacting the cup or table edges.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_2 is shifted to the right, creating clearance so box_1's right side becomes accessible for a stable two-handed grasp."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 4,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Box_1 (30x30x30 cm) is reachable and has enough lateral clearance on both left and right sides (right side cleared by moving box_2) to allow two-arm side contact without collision.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_1 is securely held and lifted off the tabletop under dual-arm control (picked up)."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The cup (5x5x8 cm) is within reach of the right arm, and its left/right/front sides are accessible, allowing a safe lateral grasp without colliding with box_2 behind it.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is securely grasped by the right end-effector and lifted clear of the tabletop, removing the obstruction in front of box_2.

parsed_json.Target: table (front-right open area, away from box_1 and box_2)
parsed_json.Precondition: The robot is holding the cup and there is a clear, stable region on the tabletop to place it such that it will not interfere with manipulating box_1 or box_2.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is placed on the table in a clear front-right area and released; the space around the boxes is less cluttered.

parsed_json.Precondition: The right side of box_2 is accessible and there is sufficient free space to the right to slide box_2 away from box_1 without contacting the cup or table edges.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_2 is shifted to the right, creating clearance so box_1's right side becomes accessible for a stable two-handed grasp.

parsed_json.Precondition: Box_1 (30x30x30 cm) is reachable and has enough lateral clearance on both left and right sides (right side cleared by moving box_2) to allow two-arm side contact without collision.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_1 is securely held and lifted off the tabletop under dual-arm control (picked up).
